reviews.review_description: I really liked the game, but it has a LOT of flaws and bugs, and I've mentioned them all here: add a feature so you can enter your nickname. Add a pool on the first floor. Add the monsters Gus, Ashy, and Sandman. Add lighting on the second floor. Add a new monster called “gisser.” It looks like gus, but it's completely black with small white eyes, and its theme song is called “Wake Up The President” (it was in the game lethal ape 3). Add a room with statues of all the monsters and their names, as well as a description of each monster in the game lobby. Add a continuation to the last room, “Entrance,” since you can exit the map there. Can you add a monitor with cameras on the third floor? Please fix the bug with monsters, as they can be removed from the map using anti_entity_cube. Please add quest-cam. PLEASE add an opening to the second floor near the lobby, as in the game Lethal Ape 3 OG. Add several servers or the ability to create your own room. If possible, replace the music in the boombox store with the original boombox music, and make it so that the boombox can be picked up. I really hope you fix your game, good luck!

Your game is really fun, but I'd like to give you an idea for a new "Mimic" monster. It looks like a regular monkey, but when a player approaches, the Mimic transforms into a monster. And by the way, please add a monitor with a camera, a quest camera, so you can change names and log into different servers, a pool on the first floor, a second floor near the lobby, a new monster, Gisser—he's like Gus, only all black and has small white eyes. Add a continuation to the room near the entrance, and also add a sign to the room with all the monster statues in the lobby.

W game so good quality and no stolen monster textures also i have ideas to add :more grabbables more monsters like a mimic or like a monster that can hide or something like that and also add  the entrance and like a outside area with bushes and trees and add more vemding machines W GAME

This game is good but there are some issues ive experienced during the game, which being...

1. Most of the monster normal speeds are so slow its mostly hard to get to specific areas you want to go and explore without having to walk past a slow monster.
2. Most people dont know all the monsters name and how they look like so you can only see their name with a tracker and to see their design you have to find them around the map.
3. Some monster sounds have a shower range where players can hear which kinda sucks since you hear thr sound when the monster is pretty much close enough to kill you.

All in all, it is a great game but again, there's room for improvements and im aware this game recently released, I wanted to separate from the kids that 5 star the with little to no feedback.

Edit: where is gus?? and we can't enter nicknames
so I have been playing this game for weeks and they have many things you can do so you download this game ￼
I am honestly so happy that Gub finally got his game on the Meta store. I have been playing for a while, and this game is still so cool. Thanks Gub!
